name: Royal Deluxe Holdings Limited
summary: Royal Deluxe Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides formwork erection and related ancillary services in Hong Kong. It undertakes formwork erection works for building construction and civil engineering projects. The company also develops construction technology and related consultancy services; and offers fit-out services and engineering design services. It serves government, public transport operators, and theme park and property developers. The Company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong. Royal Deluxe Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Wang K M Limited.
